---
title: "Teaching & Mentorship"
---

# Teaching & Mentorship

I value making science accessible, useful, and collaborative. My teaching and mentorship work spans ecology, quantitative methods, field research, scientific communication, and support for students navigating research.

::: {.project-card-grid}

::: {.project-card}
![Teaching image](images/teaching.jpg){.project-card-image}

### Teaching

Experience supporting students in ecology, biology, environmental health, and quantitative research methods.

**Teaching · quantitative methods · ecology**
:::

::: {.project-card}
![Mentorship image](images/mentorship.jpg){.project-card-image}

### Mentorship

Mentoring students and early-career researchers through fieldwork, analysis, writing, and professional development.

**Mentorship · research training · professional development**
:::

::: {.project-card}
![Outreach image](images/outreach.jpg){.project-card-image}

### Outreach and engagement

Communicating environmental health research across audiences and working across cultural, disciplinary, and institutional contexts.

**Outreach · science communication · community engagement**
:::

:::
